questions.question:
A node recovery brief is incomplete and contains unsafe kubelet remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `node-recovery-brief` already exists in namespace `node-health-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetNode` is `kind-cluster-worker`
- `nodeConditionCheck` is `kubectl describe node kind-cluster-worker | grep -A3 Conditions`
- `kubeletServiceCheck` is `sudo systemctl status kubelet`
- `kubeletLogCheck` is `sudo journalctl -u kubelet -n 50`
- `configCheck` is `sudo test -f /var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml`
- `runtimeCheck` is `sudo crictl info`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q601/node-recovery-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q601/node-notready-checklist.txt` with the sections `Node Conditions`, `Kubelet Service`, and `Runtime and Config`

Do not restart kubelet, do not reboot the node, and do not drain or uncordon nodes during this drill.

verification.description: The node recovery brief ConfigMap uses the intended node target, kubelet checks, and runtime/config inspection commands
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact node condition, kubelet, and runtime/config commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe node remediation guidance is removed

questions.question:
A certificate renewal brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe PKI guidance.

A ConfigMap named `certificate-renewal-brief` already exists in namespace `pki-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetCertificate` is `/etc/kubernetes/pki/apiserver.crt`
- `expiryCheck` is `sudo kubeadm certs check-expiration`
- `dateInspection` is `sudo openssl x509 -in /etc/kubernetes/pki/apiserver.crt -noout -dates`
- `kubeconfigCheck` is `sudo grep -n client-certificate-data /etc/kubernetes/admin.conf`
- `renewalCommand` is `sudo kubeadm certs renew apiserver`
- `readinessCheck` is `kubectl get --raw='/readyz?verbose'`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q602/certificate-renewal-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q602/certificate-expiry-checklist.txt` with the sections `Certificate Inspection`, `Renewal Planning`, and `Post-Renewal Verification`

Do not run `kubeadm certs renew`, do not restart kubelet, and do not delete static pod manifests during this drill.

verification.description: The certificate renewal brief ConfigMap uses the intended apiserver certificate target, expiry inspection commands, kubeconfig check, and renewal guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact certificate inspection, renewal planning, and post-renewal verification commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe PKI actions are removed

questions.question:
A resource guardrails brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe quota guidance.

A ConfigMap named `resource-guardrails-brief` already exists in namespace `quota-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetNamespace` is `quota-lab`
- `quotaInspection` is `kubectl get resourcequota -n quota-lab`
- `quotaDescribe` is `kubectl describe resourcequota compute-quota -n quota-lab`
- `limitRangeInspection` is `kubectl describe limitrange default-limits -n quota-lab`
- `workloadInspection` is `kubectl describe deployment api -n quota-lab`
- `recommendedPatch` is `kubectl set resources deployment/api -n quota-lab --requests=cpu=250m,memory=256Mi --limits=cpu=500m,memory=512Mi`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q603/resource-guardrails-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q603/resource-quota-checklist.txt` with the sections `Quota Inspection`, `LimitRange Inspection`, and `Workload Sizing Guidance`

Do not delete ResourceQuota or LimitRange objects, do not scale workloads to zero, and do not remove resource requests or limits during this drill.

verification.description: The resource guardrails brief ConfigMap uses the intended namespace target, quota inspection commands, LimitRange inspection, workload review, and safe resource patch guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact quota, LimitRange, and workload sizing commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe quota remediation guidance is removed
